_metadata.description: Clinically relevant probiotic strains and prebiotic compounds
_metadata.signoff_status_note: 42/49 strains fully signed off (dr_pham_signoff: true). Dr Pham completed post-verification async pass on 2026-04-21: 3 strains downgraded (B. clausii strong→medium; 2 L. paracasei strong→weak), 2 citations swapped (Lpc-37 → PMID 33385020; Nissle 1917 → PMID 15479682 [Kruis 2004 gold-standard RCT]), 8 weak strains confirmed honest. 2026-05-22 unmapped-resolution batch added 2 new entries pending Dr Pham review: STRAIN_PLANTARUM_LP01 (Probiotical LMG P-21021, 3 content-verified PMIDs) and STRAIN_LACTIS_BS01 (Probiotical LMG P-21384, 2 content-verified PMIDs). 2026-06-05 Seed DS-01 exact-code batch added 4 formula-backed SD-* strains pending Dr Pham review; PMIDs 40944126 and 41750436 are DS-01 product/formula RCTs, not isolated strain-specific trials. 2026-07-13 added exact M-63 identity with two content-verified single-strain RCTs (PMIDs 36986131 and 42056537), conservatively classified moderate pending clinician review.
_metadata.clinical_validation_note: 14 non-flipped strains now carry clinical_support_level per 4-question framework (strain-explicit / outcome-relevant / human-clinical / dose-mentioned). All 14 score 'weak' at abstract level; 5 have stronger swap candidates identified. Dr Pham review required before any PMID swap.
_metadata.reviewer_note_2026_04_21: Clinical reviewer cited PMID 25727267 as additional support for L. reuteri Prodentis (peri-implant mucositis RCT). API verification on 2026-04-21 shows PMID 25727267 is a chemistry paper on ethylene effect screening — likely a typo in reviewer's notes. The primary swap PMID 23176716 is independently verified and sufficient.

clinically_relevant_strains.notable_studies: Over 1000 published studies, 250+ clinical trials, most researched probiotic strain worldwide

evidence.source_short: ESPGHAN 2016 Working Group — AAD prevention in children
evidence.recommendation_strength: strong recommendation, moderate quality of evidence

secondary_indications.name: acute infectious diarrhea duration reduction
secondary_indications.source_short: Cochrane 2020 — probiotics for acute infectious diarrhoea

cfu_thresholds.notes: Tier cutoffs are industry convention (1B / 10B / 50B CFU/day). ESPGHAN 2016 strongly recommends LGG for AAD prevention but the abstract does not specify the exact CFU threshold; adequate/good boundary pending Dr Pham full-text review.

evidence.source_short: NPJ biofilms and microbiomes — One-year supplementation with Lactobacillus reuteri ATCC PTA 6475 counteracts a degradation of gut microbiota in older women with low bone mineral density.

cfu_thresholds.notes: Tier cutoffs are industry convention (1B / 10B / 50B CFU/day). Strain referenced but evidence is adjacent (review / co-studied paper). Dr Pham may upgrade citation when signing off.

clinically_relevant_strains.notable_studies: RCTs for perceived stress reduction, immune function. Part of HOWARU line. (IFF/DuPont)

evidence.source_short: Neurobiology of Stress (2020) — The Sisu Study: probiotic effects on stress/mood; strain-specific clinical evidence

previous_citation.source_short: Clinical nutrition (Edinburgh, Scotland) — Effect of caloric restriction with probiotic supplementation on body composition, quality of life, and psychobiological factors of obese men: A randomized, d
previous_citation.swap_reason: Dr Pham 2026-04-21: citation swap. PMID 39842252 (abstract didn't name Lpc-37) → PMID 33385020 (Sisu Study, strain-specific clinical evidence per Dr Pham's selection).

cfu_thresholds.notes: Tier cutoffs are industry convention (1B / 10B / 50B CFU/day). Strain referenced but evidence is adjacent (review / co-studied paper). Dr Pham may upgrade citation when signing off.
cfu_thresholds.dr_pham_signoff_verification_note: Dr Pham 2026-04-21: citation swap. PMID 39842252 (abstract didn't name Lpc-37) → PMID 33385020 (Sisu Study, strain-specific clinical evidence per Dr Pham's selection).

clinically_relevant_strains.notable_studies: Phase 2b RCT: 30% recurrence rate vs 45% placebo for BV prevention. LACTIN-V applicator studied at UCSF. Published in NEJM. (Osel)

evidence.source_short: The Lancet. Microbe — Sustained effect of LACTIN-V (Lactobacillus crispatus CTV-05) on genital immunology following standard bacterial vaginosis treatment: results from a randomised, placebo-controlle

cfu_thresholds.notes: Tier cutoffs are industry convention (1B / 10B / 50B CFU/day). Strain-specific RCT or meta-analysis.

clinically_relevant_strains.notable_studies: 100+ years of use. RCTs show equivalence to mesalazine for UC remission maintenance. EMA approved. (Ardeypharm)

evidence.source_short: Gut (2004) Kruis et al. — Maintaining remission of ulcerative colitis with Escherichia coli Nissle 1917 is as effective as standard mesalazine (RCT, multicenter, n=327)

previous_citation.source_short: Nature communications — Programmable probiotics modulate inflammation and gut microbiota for inflammatory bowel disease treatment after effective oral delivery.
previous_citation.swap_reason: Dr Pham 2026-04-21: citation swap. PMID 35701435 (engineered-variant mouse IBD paper) → PMID 15479682 (Kruis 2004 gold-standard UC maintenance RCT vs mesalazine, Gut).

cfu_thresholds.notes: Tier cutoffs are industry convention (1B / 10B / 50B CFU/day). Strain referenced but evidence is adjacent (review / co-studied paper). Dr Pham may upgrade citation when signing off.
cfu_thresholds.dr_pham_signoff_verification_note: Dr Pham 2026-04-21: citation swap. PMID 35701435 (engineered-variant mouse IBD paper) → PMID 15479682 (Kruis 2004 gold-standard UC maintenance RCT vs mesalazine, Gut).

clinically_relevant_strains.notable_studies: RCT showed significant reduction in adult acne lesions. Oral probiotic for skin health. (Sacco)

evidence.source_short: Australian dental journal — Severity of Candida-associated denture stomatitis is improved in institutionalized elders who consume Lactobacillus rhamnosus SP1.

cfu_thresholds.notes: Tier cutoffs are industry convention (1B / 10B / 50B CFU/day). Strain referenced but evidence is adjacent (review / co-studied paper). Dr Pham may upgrade citation when signing off.

clinically_relevant_strains.notable_studies: Clinical trials for digestive and immune health. Part of multi-strain formulations. (UAS Labs)

evidence.source_short: Nutrients —

cfu_thresholds.notes: Tier cutoffs are industry convention (1B / 10B / 50B CFU/day). Best-available PubMed hit is animal-model / narrative / mixed-strain. Dr Pham should replace with a stronger strain-specific RCT if one exists.
cfu_thresholds.dr_pham_signoff_verification_note: Dr Pham 2026-04-21: 'weak is honest' — no stronger citation available; retain weak evidence classification. Scorer caps contribution at 50% per E1.3.2 tier rules.

clinically_relevant_strains.notable_studies: Probiotical S.p.A. (Italy) strain. 3 published RCTs in distinct indications: bacterial vaginosis vaginal-tablet pilot (Vicariotto 2014), tube-fed elderly nutritional-status RCT (IntegPRO, Orlandoni 2021, co-formulated with BS01), and subthreshold-depression RCT (Moschonis 2026, online 2024).

cfu_thresholds.indication_primary: vaginal/urogenital health and adjunctive GI support

evidence.source_short: J Clin Gastroenterol — Vicariotto 2014 BV pilot RCT (vaginal tablets) names L. plantarum LP01 (LMG P-21021); reinforced by IntegPRO (Orlandoni 2021) and Moschonis 2026.

clinical_validation.q4_dose_sample: Vicariotto vaginal-tablet pilot (n small); strain identity confirmed by LMG P-21021 accession in abstract.

cfu_thresholds.notes: Tier cutoffs are industry convention (1B / 10B / 50B CFU/day). Strain-specific RCTs verified via PubMed content (abstracts name 'L. plantarum LP01 (LMG P-21021)' verbatim). DEFER FINAL SCORING until Dr Pham reviews — recommend retaining 'moderate' evidence_strength until clinician confirms whether BV pilot + IntegPRO + depression RCT meet 'strong' threshold for this scorer's E1.3.2 tier rules. Probiotical's own product page cites PMID 29799760 for BS01 — that PMID resolves to a Nano Letters physics paper and must NOT be propagated to either LP01 or BS01 entries.
cfu_thresholds.dr_pham_signoff_verification_note: Pending Dr Pham review. Entry added 2026-05-22 as Phase 2 of the 2026-05-22 unmapped-resolution batch (Lp-01 surfaced in Life Extension probiotic products with the strain code on label).

clinically_relevant_strains.notable_studies: Probiotical S.p.A. (Italy) strain. Strain-specific RCTs: evacuation-disorders / hard-stools double-blind placebo-controlled trial (Del Piano 2010), tube-fed elderly nutritional-status RCT (IntegPRO, Orlandoni 2021, co-formulated with LP01).

evidence.source_short: J Clin Gastroenterol — Del Piano 2010 evacuation-disorders RCT names 'Bifidobacterium animalis subspecies lactis BS01 (LMG P-21384)' verbatim with dose + 30-day protocol; reinforced by IntegPRO (Orlandoni 2021).

clinical_validation.q4_dose_sample: Del Piano 2010 specifies dose + 30-day daily intake; strain identity confirmed by LMG P-21384 accession in abstract.

cfu_thresholds.notes: Tier cutoffs are industry convention (1B / 10B / 50B CFU/day). Strain-specific RCTs verified via PubMed content (abstracts name BS01 with LMG P-21384 accession verbatim). DEFER FINAL SCORING until Dr Pham reviews — recommend retaining 'moderate' evidence_strength until clinician confirms whether Del Piano + IntegPRO meet 'strong' threshold for this scorer's E1.3.2 tier rules. Note: PMID 29799760 on Probiotical's BS01 product page is a citation error (resolves to a Nano Letters physics paper) and must NOT be propagated.
cfu_thresholds.dr_pham_signoff_verification_note: Pending Dr Pham review. Entry added 2026-05-22 as Phase 2 of the 2026-05-22 unmapped-resolution batch (BS-01 / BS01 / BS-1 / 'B. lactis BS01' variants surfaced in Life Extension probiotic products).

clinically_relevant_strains.notable_studies: Seed DS-01 formula-level RCTs evaluated a 24-strain multi-species synbiotic containing this labeled strain. Evidence is formula-backed, not isolated strain-specific.

cfu_thresholds.indication_primary: gut microbiome diversity and gut barrier support

evidence.source_short: Seed DS-01 RCTs: healthy adults (PMID 40944126) and post-antibiotic recovery (PMID 41750436)

clinical_validation.q4_dose_sample: DS-01 53.6 billion AFU multi-species probiotic plus 400 mg Indian pomegranate extract for 91 days.
clinical_validation.framework: 4-question clinical validation; formula-level evidence cannot be upgraded to isolated strain-specific high support

cfu_thresholds.notes: Tier cutoffs are industry convention (1B / 10B / 50B CFU/day). DS-01 PMIDs support the complete formula, not this strain alone; keep support moderate until clinician review or isolated strain-specific human evidence is added.
cfu_thresholds.dr_pham_signoff_verification_note: Pending Dr Pham review. Entry added 2026-06-05 to support exact Seed DS-01 label identity without mapping to unrelated representative strains.
